title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform reliability and data handling capabilities. We enhanced data import resilience to better handle unexpected data formats, improved Salesforce deployment recovery when errors occur, and strengthened our ability to detect and work around Salesforce configuration quirks like State/Country picklists. Several behind-the-scenes fixes ensure smoother automation execution and more consistent platform performance.

entries.headline: Enhanced data import reliability and workflow enrichment
Salesforce deployments now automatically recover from errors
Plugin names now display consistently across the platform
Restored missing historical data from weeks 12 and 13
Better detection of Salesforce State and Country picklist configurations
details: OpsPal now identifies when your Salesforce org uses State/Country picklists and adjusts validation accordingly
Deployment workflows are more reliable with improved permission checking and retry logic

entries.headline: Salesforce multi-step deployments now run more reliably
Resolved HubSpot connection issues preventing automation launches
